summary: RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) testing completed successfully. All 9 features tested and working correctly. Backend API access control and frontend UI both properly implement the 3-role system (super_admin, admin, user).
seed_data_creation: Test user created during RBAC tests (user123@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC system fully tested and working. 3 roles: super_admin, admin, user. Super admin auto-created at startup. All protected routes return 403 for unauthorized users.

RBAC Backend - User cannot access GET /a.details: Regular user receives 403 Forbidden when trying to access /api/users

RBAC Backend - User cannot modify settin.details: Regular user receives 403 Forbidden when trying to modify settings

RBAC Backend - Super admin can list user.details: Super admin can successfully list all users with their roles

RBAC Backend - Super admin can update us.details: Super admin can change user roles between user, admin, super_admin

RBAC Frontend - Super admin sidebar show.details: Sidebar displays 'ADMINISTRATION' section with 'Utilisateurs' link for super_admin

RBAC Frontend - Regular user sidebar hid.details: Sidebar does NOT show Administration section for regular users

Users Page - Displays user list with rol.details: Users page shows all users with their names, emails, roles, and last login dates

Users Page - Role change functionality.details: Role selector dropdown shows 3 options (Utilisateur, Administrateur, Super Admin) and allows role changes

Login - Returns role in response.details: Login response includes user.role field with correct role value
